inputs.label: Gross Income ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total income received from all 1099 contracts before any deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total income received from all 1099 contracts before any deductions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm 1099 sözleşmelerinden herhangi bir kesinti öncesi alınan toplam gelir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu total reçu de tous les contrats 1099 avant déductions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso total recibido de todos los contratos 1099 antes de cualquier deducción.

inputs.label: Business Expenses ($)
inputs.businessContext: Ordinary and necessary expenses directly related to the business (e.g., supplies, home office, mileage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Ordinary and necessary expenses directly related to the business (e.g., supplies, home office, mileage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletmeyle doğrudan ilgili olağan ve gerekli giderler (örn. malzemeler, ev ofisi, kilometre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewöhnliche und notwendige Ausgaben, die direkt mit dem Geschäft zusammenhängen (z. B. Büromaterial, Homeoffice, Kilometer).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses ordinaires et nécessaires directement liées à l'entreprise (p. ex. fournitures, bureau à domicile, kilométrage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos ordinarios y necesarios directamente relacionados con el negocio (p. ej., suministros, oficina en casa, kilometraje).

inputs.label: Federal Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Marginal federal income tax rate applied to taxable income after deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Marginal federal income tax rate applied to taxable income after deductions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesintilerden sonra vergilendirilebilir gelire uygulanan marjinal federal gelir vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Grenzsteuersatz der Bundessteuer auf das zu versteuernde Einkommen nach Abzügen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux marginal d'imposition fédéral appliqué au revenu imposable après déductions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa marginal del impuesto federal sobre la renta aplicada al ingreso imponible después de las deducciones.

inputs.label: State Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Combined state and local income tax rate, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined state and local income tax rate, if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa, birleşik eyalet ve yerel gelir vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierter Landes- und Kommunalsteuersatz, falls zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux combiné d'imposition de l'État et locale, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa combinada del impuesto estatal y local sobre la renta, si corresponde.

inputs.label: Self-Employment Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Social Security and Medicare taxes for self-employed individuals (typically 15.3% on 92.35% of net profit).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de cotisation sociale des travailleurs indépendants (%)
label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto al trabajo por cuenta propia (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Social Security and Medicare taxes for self-employed individuals (typically 15.3% on 92.35% of net profit).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Serbest meslek sahipleri için Sosyal Güvenlik ve Medicare vergileri (genellikle net kârın %92,35'i üzerinden %15,3).
businessContext_i18n.de: Sozialversicherungs- und Medicare-Steuern für Selbstständige (in der Regel 15,3 % auf 92,35 % des Nettogewinns).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cotisations de sécurité sociale et d'assurance-maladie pour les travailleurs indépendants (généralement 15,3 % sur 92,35 % du bénéfice net).
businessContext_i18n.es: Impuestos de Seguridad Social y Medicare para trabajadores por cuenta propia (típicamente 15.3% sobre el 92.35% de la ganancia neta).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
